summary: Regen-safe no-op stub satisfying the generator's undefined resolveSubstackPublicationIDTemplate reference, emitted because the API is named after a reserved scaffold noun.
reason: Naming the API 'substack' makes the generator emit calls to an undefined resolveSubstackPublicationIDTemplate — a drafts-scaffolding path keyed on the API name that has no matching template, so the generated tree does not compile. internal/cli/substack_resolve.go provides a small no-op stub that satisfies the reference without editing any generated DO-NOT-EDIT file, keeping the fix regen-safe. Candidate upstream generator report (resolve<Name>Template undefined when --name matches a reserved noun).
validated_outcome: go build ./... green with the stub in place; removing it reproduces the undefined-symbol build error.
